compare.title: Compare
compare.noComparison: Select a date range to compare periods. Comparison is not available for "All time".

usage.title: Usage & Limits
usage.rateLimited: Rate limited by Anthropic API - showing cached data. Try again in a minute.
usage.rateLimitedNoData: Rate limited by Anthropic API - no cached data available. This is a known Anthropic server issue. Try again in a few minutes.

settings.title: Settings
settings.mcpServersDesc: External tools and services connected via Model Context Protocol
settings.permissionsDesc: Tool access rules and permission mode
settings.memoryDesc: CLAUDE.md instruction files loaded at startup
settings.agentsDesc: Custom subagent definitions for specialized tasks
settings.hooksDesc: Scripts that run in response to Claude Code events
settings.modeDefault: Asks for permission on potentially destructive actions
settings.modeAcceptEdits: Auto-approves file edits, asks for everything else
settings.modePlan: Read-only mode, Claude cannot modify files or run commands
settings.additionalDirectoriesDesc: Extra directories Claude Code can access outside the project root
settings.aiUpdatePromptPlaceholder: e.g. Add a section about error handling...

notifications.title: Monitoring
notifications.description: Get alerted when you approach rate limits so you never get caught off guard.
notifications.permissionNotDetermined: Notification permission has not been requested yet.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Enable it in macOS System Settings > Notifications > Claude Command.
notifications.thresholdsDesc: Choose which utilization levels trigger an alert for each rate limit window.
notifications.paceAlertsDesc: Tracks your usage rate and projects whether you'll exhaust your limits before they reset.
notifications.paceNoData: Pace data will appear after a few minutes of usage tracking.
notifications.paceOnTrackDetail: At your current pace, you will not exhaust this limit before it resets.
notifications.paceExhaustDetail: At your current pace, this limit will be exhausted by {time}.
notifications.paceInsufDetail: Need a few more minutes of snapshots to calculate your pace.
notifications.paceEnabledHint: Fire a desktop notification when projected usage crosses a threshold before reset
notifications.paceProjectedLevelsDesc: Alert when your projected usage at reset exceeds these levels.
notifications.paceWindowsDesc: Choose which rate limit windows to monitor for pace alerts.
notifications.closeToTrayDesc: Keep the app running in the system tray when you close the window.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Notifications
whatsapp.description: Receive rate limit alerts directly on WhatsApp. Connect your phone to get started.
whatsapp.enableNotificationsDesc: When enabled, threshold and pace alerts will also be sent as WhatsApp messages.
whatsapp.wizardPhoneDesc: Enter the WhatsApp number that will receive alerts.
whatsapp.wizardPhoneInfo: This number will receive all rate limit notifications. You can change it later.
whatsapp.wizardQrDesc: Open WhatsApp on your phone and scan this code.
whatsapp.wizardQrInstruction: Go to WhatsApp > Settings > Linked Devices > Link a Device, then scan the code above.
whatsapp.wizardSuccessDesc: WhatsApp is connected and ready to send notifications.
whatsapp.wizardSuccessTest: Send a test message to verify everything works.
whatsapp.sessionSectionDesc: Manage the WhatsApp connection. Disconnect keeps the session for quick reconnect. Logout clears it entirely.

source.overviewNote: Costs from Anthropic Billing API (full history). Sessions, tokens, and activity from local files (limited to data on disk).
source.overviewNoteMax: All data from local session files. Costs estimated from token usage and model pricing.
source.costsNote: Cost data from Anthropic Billing API. Token breakdown estimated from local session files.
source.costsNoteMax: Costs estimated from token usage and model pricing. Not actual subscription charges.
source.sessionsNote: Session data from local files. Claude Code retains approximately 2 months of session history on disk.
source.projectsNote: Project data derived from local session files. Only covers sessions still on disk.
source.jsonlRotationWarning: Claude Code rotates local files every ~2 months. Synced data is preserved in the database, so historical coverage grows over time. Oldest record: {date}.
